series_metadata.series_title: AREAS OF CONCERN/REMEDIAL ACTION PLANS/LAKEWIDE MG
series_metadata.series_description: Clean-up of Great Lakes Areas of Concern (Ashutabula, Black, Cuyahoga, Maumee Rivers) by Remedial Action Plans which provide classification, status, site ownership, development guidelines, public participation and monitoring of the areas of concern/remedial action plans, lakewide management plans and other federally-required information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area ten years
